name: 07-cross-locale-mapping-inheritance
description: Pushing fr-ca for source item 1000. fr-ca has no mapping yet, but en-us already has {src:1000, tgt:5000}. findContentInOtherLocale should locate the en-us mapping and reuse target ID 5000 — so fr-ca writes {src:1000, tgt:5000} instead of creating a brand-new item in the target.
